chunks.title: The Vanity of Oppression and Labor
chunks.reason: A continuous reflection on the futility of oppression, labor, and the preference for death or rest over toil.

chunks.title: The Value of Companionship
chunks.reason: An extended argument on the practical benefits of having a companion for labor, warmth, and defense.

chunks.title: The Rise and Fall of the King
chunks.reason: A narrative illustration of a wise youth replacing an old king, followed by the observation that new generations replace the old.
